item.title: Microsoft Azure
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: Microsoft and Databricks are celebrating nearly a decade of strategic partnership.

evidence.source_quote: For nearly a decade, Databricks and Microsoft have helped enterprises innovate with data and AI

updates.event: Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway are deeply integrated across the Microsoft product stack, including Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.

evidence.source_quote: With Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway deeply integrated across Microsoft's products

updates.event: Azure Cobalt 200 includes memory encryption enabled by default.

evidence.source_quote: includes memory encryption enabled by default

updates.event: Databricks is running its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks.

evidence.source_quote: Databricks deepens its commitment to Azure, running its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks

updates.event: Azure Cobalt is Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure.

evidence.source_quote: leveraging Azure Cobalt, Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure

updates.event: Microsoft and Databricks extended their strategic partnership through the 2030s to scale enterprise AI.

evidence.source_quote: Databricks and Microsoft extend strategic partnership through the 2030s to scale enterprise AI

updates.event: Databricks currently uses Azure Cobalt 100 and plans to adopt Cobalt 200.

evidence.source_quote: Databricks currently uses Cobalt 100 and plans to adopt Cobalt 200

updates.event: 此次合作旨在强化微软面向美国政府机会的独立软件供应商（ISV）生态系统，覆盖 AI 原生、网络安全、企业软件及关键基础设施公司。
updates.after_state: "expansion of ISV ecosystem targeting AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies for U.S. government"

evidence.source_quote: The collaboration strengthens Microsoft’s ecosystem for independent software vendors (ISVs) pursuing government opportunities while expanding the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.

updates.event: Adobe、Armis、Celonis、BigID 等领先软件提供商通过 Knox 在 Azure 政府云上为政府客户提供商用创新技术。

evidence.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.

updates.event: 通过 Knox 预授权的联邦托管云，软件公司可在 90 天内在 Microsoft Azure 政府云上获得可用于生产的联邦云环境。

evidence.source_quote: Knox enables software providers to achieve production-ready federal cloud environments in as little as 90 days through its pre-authorized Federal Managed Cloud.

updates.event: 33% of surveyed enterprises cite Microsoft Azure as a provider they are considering switching to or adding.

evidence.source_quote: the providers drawing the most switching consideration are again the incumbents — Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud (33% each), OpenAI (30%), and Gemini (22%)

updates.event: MAI-Code-1-Flash achieves approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft says the model achieves an approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.

updates.event: MAI-Image-2.5-Pro is priced at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft priced the model at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

updates.event: In PowerPoint, MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2.

evidence.source_quote: In PowerPoint, Microsoft says MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2, OpenAI's image model.

updates.event: MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters, 32% less than MAI-Voice-2.

evidence.source_quote: Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

updates.event: The collaboration expands the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.
updates.after_state: "AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure ISVs"

evidence.source_quote: the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers

updates.event: Named Knox customers/partners include Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers relying on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government.
updates.after_state: "Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers"

evidence.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.

updates.event: MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters and runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 at 32% lower cost.

evidence.source_quote: Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

updates.event: Microsoft priced MAI-Image-2.5-Pro at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.
updates.after_state: "$5 per million text input tokens; $8 per million image input tokens; $106 per million image output tokens"

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft priced the model at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

updates.event: 摩根士丹利称88%的CIO计划在未来12个月内部署Microsoft 365 Copilot，高于去年的72%。

evidence.source_quote: 企业端 Copilot 部署意愿持续提升，88% 的 CIO 计划未来 12 个月落地 M365 Copilot，高于去年 72% 的水平。

updates.event: 摩根士丹利报告指出微软FY28市盈率约16倍，对应20%以上可持续EPS增速。

evidence.source_quote: 公司 FY28 市盈率 16 倍，对应 20% 以上可持续 EPS 增速，估值具备吸引力。

updates.event: 摩根士丹利判断Azure增长瓶颈来自产能供给侧，市场需求保持旺盛。
updates.after_state: "Azure增长瓶颈来自产能供给，市场需求保持旺盛"

evidence.source_quote: 大摩判断 Azure 增长瓶颈来自产能供给，市场需求保持旺盛。

updates.event: Azure Databricks integrations span Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.
updates.after_state: "integration across Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, OneLake, Power BI, Purview, Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot"

evidence.source_quote: Deeply integrated across the Microsoft ecosystem spanning Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

updates.event: Microsoft is integrating Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway across the Microsoft product stack including Microsoft 365.
updates.after_state: "native integration across Microsoft stack including Databricks Genie and Microsoft 365"

evidence.source_quote: both companies advance native integration across the Microsoft stack, including Databricks Genie and Microsoft 365

updates.event: Databricks will run its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks as part of the expanded deal.
updates.after_state: "run core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks"

evidence.source_quote: Databricks deepens its commitment to Azure, running its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks

updates.event: Azure Cobalt is described as Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure used by Databricks to improve performance and efficiency.

evidence.source_quote: leveraging Azure Cobalt, Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure, to improve performance and efficiency

updates.event: Databricks and Microsoft extended their decade-long strategic partnership into the 2030s to scale enterprise AI.

evidence.source_quote: Databricks and Microsoft extend strategic partnership through the 2030s to scale enterprise AI

updates.event: 微软于2026年7月23日推出自研模型 MAI-Image-2.5-Pro 和 MAI-Voice-2-Flash 的公开预览版

evidence.source_quote: Am 23. Juli 2026 startete das Unternehmen die öffentliche Vorschau seiner neuen Modelle MAI-Image-2.5-Pro und MAI-Voice-2-Flash.

updates.event: 微软切换至 MAI 模型的原因是速度和 [其他方面] 有显著提升

evidence.source_quote: Grund für den Wechsel sind deutliche Verbesserungen bei Geschwindigkeit und […]

facts.statement: Microsoft and Databricks are celebrating nearly a decade of strategic partnership.
Azure Cobalt is Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure.
Databricks currently uses Azure Cobalt 100 and plans to adopt Cobalt 200.
Databricks is running its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks.
Azure Cobalt 200 includes memory encryption enabled by default.
Microsoft and Databricks extended their strategic partnership through the 2030s to scale enterprise AI.
Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway are deeply integrated across the Microsoft product stack, including Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.
此次合作旨在强化微软面向美国政府机会的独立软件供应商（ISV）生态系统，覆盖 AI 原生、网络安全、企业软件及关键基础设施公司。
facts.value: expansion of ISV ecosystem targeting AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies for U.S. government

facts.statement: Adobe、Armis、Celonis、BigID 等领先软件提供商通过 Knox 在 Azure 政府云上为政府客户提供商用创新技术。
通过 Knox 预授权的联邦托管云，软件公司可在 90 天内在 Microsoft Azure 政府云上获得可用于生产的联邦云环境。
33% of surveyed enterprises cite Microsoft Azure as a provider they are considering switching to or adding.
MAI-Image-2.5-Pro is priced at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.
MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters, 32% less than MAI-Voice-2.
In PowerPoint, MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2.
MAI-Code-1-Flash achieves approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.
Named Knox customers/partners include Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers relying on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government.
facts.value: Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers

facts.statement: The collaboration expands the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.
facts.value: AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure ISVs

facts.statement: Microsoft priced MAI-Image-2.5-Pro at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.
facts.value: $5 per million text input tokens; $8 per million image input tokens; $106 per million image output tokens

facts.statement: 摩根士丹利判断Azure增长瓶颈来自产能供给侧，市场需求保持旺盛。
facts.value: Azure增长瓶颈来自产能供给，市场需求保持旺盛

facts.statement: 摩根士丹利称88%的CIO计划在未来12个月内部署Microsoft 365 Copilot，高于去年的72%。
摩根士丹利报告指出微软FY28市盈率约16倍，对应20%以上可持续EPS增速。
Azure Cobalt is described as Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure used by Databricks to improve performance and efficiency.

Azure Databricks integrations span Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.
facts.value: integration across Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, OneLake, Power BI, Purview, Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

facts.statement: Databricks will run its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks as part of the expanded deal.
facts.effective_period: ongoing as part of latest deal
facts.value: run core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks

facts.statement: Databricks and Microsoft extended their decade-long strategic partnership into the 2030s to scale enterprise AI.
微软切换至 MAI 模型的原因是速度和 [其他方面] 有显著提升
微软于2026年7月23日推出自研模型 MAI-Image-2.5-Pro 和 MAI-Voice-2-Flash 的公开预览版
facts.value: MAI-Image-2.5-Pro 和 MAI-Voice-2-Flash 公开预览
